title: Lelepet Dog Halloween Costume - Clown Style Pet Cosplay, Funny Dogs Cats Outfits, Adjustable Dog Cloak & Hood for Christmas, Halloween, Parties, Orange S
features: High-Quality Fabric: This dog costume is made of soft and skin-friendly orange fabric, which is comfortable and breathable, providing a comfortable wearing experience for dogs. It is an ideal choice for Halloween, Christmas, parties and other festivals

Unique Clown Design: This dog Halloween costume features a distinctive clown style, making your pet the star of any Halloween party. The bright combination of orange and black, along with the cute clown hat, is sure to catch people's eyes and add a touch of fun to the festive atmosphere

Easy to Wear & Adjustable: The dog clothing is a two-piece set of hood and cape, both featuring an adjustable magic sticker opening and closing design. The tightness can be adjusted according to the dog's size, making it more convenient to put on and take off

Perfect Halloween gift: The playful clown costume is very festive. Wearing this cosplay will make your pet blend into the fun Halloween atmosphere. Of course, it is also suitable for Christmas and other daily holiday parties

Size information: This dog Halloween costume is available in XS-3 and XL sizes, suitable for dogs and cats of all sizes. Make your pet the center of attention at the holiday party and also take perfect photos for your dog
description: From the brand Lelepet Gives Pet More Choices Lelepet is committed to pet supplies, providing pets with high-quality products, and making pets' life joyful and comfortable.
